results.title: Farooq Hafeez
highlights:
Director IT Data Engineering at [Builders FirstSource](https://www.linkedin.com/company/builders-firstsource)
...
Over 17 years of experience working in a wide array of industries like Pharma, Health Insurance, Finance, Energy, State DMV, e-commerce and Retail. Seasoned Data Engineering leader with extensive experience building high performing teams of data domain experts ground up, to play pivotal role in successful multi-year programs. Deep expertise in creating and enabling strategic and tactical planning road-maps and transition architectures. Certified (TOGAF 9.1) Enterprise Architecture practitioner with history of building successful partnerships with business, articulating and socializing technical architectures/road-maps. Extensive experience successfully building and operationalizing highly complex big data systems like, Data Lakes, Data Warehouses, Data Marts, NoSQL, Graph, OLTP Systems (ODS, Data Hubs), MDM and ETL frameworks, Reporting Layer (BI Dashboards and Reports). Implemented Data Security Architectures to improve overall safety of critical data. Experience delivering Data Architecture in compliance with regulatory regimes like GxP (CFR 21part 11) as well as stringent enterprise level security frameworks. Successfully delivered Data Solutions in on-prem, cloud only and hybrid environments. Experience implementing on-prem to cloud migration strategies for various workloads like lift and shift, re-architect and refactor. Certified Data Solution expert with relevant certifications for Azure, AWS, Snowflake and Databricks. Hands on skills like SQL for Data Analysis, Data Modeling and experience with relevant tools like Databricks, Redshift, Snowflake, Synapse, ADF, ERWin, Power BI etc. Previously worked at: Novartis, Triverus consulting, Kronos, Visiant Health, CGI, Collaborative Consulting, North Carolina Department of Transportation, Blue Cross Blue Shield of North Carolina, Elite Thompson Reuters, Duke Energy, PetsMart, Aetna, GSI Commerce, Pfizer, Emerging Health Technologies

highlights:
Business Intelligence and Automation Engineer
...
Auditor | Data Scientist
...
Senior Business Operations Analyst at [Builders FirstSource](https://www.linkedin.com/company/builders-firstsource)
...
I get to work with some intelligent, charismatic, and hard working people at Builders FirstSource. Our teams have a passion for integrity and thorough analysis and our data analytics practices allow me to use a number of tools and languages including: Microstrategy, Python, Excel, Tableau, SQL, and more. I get to work on a variety of projects to bring insights and efficiencies to my team and my company. Developing team members and serving as a resource for others are some aspects of my job that I find the most rewarding. I also enjoy the variety that comes with owning and managing projects for multiple stakeholders rather than performing monotonous tasks. I have been known to take on challenging assignments, add greater relevance to procedures, and all while tailoring the stakeholders’ experience to meet a project's individual needs. I have always enjoyed working with numbers and people. Therefore, working in Finance, Data Analytics, and Automation has been a great experience. I look forward to continue learning, understanding, and developing my skill sets.
...

administration • administrator • application administrator • applications manager • business process • business requirements • deployment • design • documentation • documentation system • engineer • enterprise business • exchange • information technology • information technology engineer • management • manufacturing • microsoft • microsoft exchange • mobile development • process • project management • requirements management • support • system applications • system design • teams • technical skills • technical solutions • technology • technology engineer • website development
...
Over the past couple of months, I’ve been building a Python-based automation system to tackle a problem I kept seeing in accounting workflows: messy, inconsistent data turning reporting into a slow, manual process.
...
I created this system as an independent contractor with Ox Boox Bookkeeping. The system takes multiple raw, unstructured sheets and automatically produces clean, professionally formatted income statemnts. What used to take weeks of manual work can now be done in a single day.
...
I built this using Python (pandas, xlsxwriter, rapidfuzz), applying data normalization and standardization, fuzzy matching, complex dataframe transformations (wide → long → wide), and financial calculation logic. Machine learning and natural language processing techniques help interpret inconsistent real-world inputs, such as misspellings or differing labels, to ensure reliable outputs.
...
Projects like this have reinforced how much leverage thoughtful data engineering can create when it’s tightly aligned with real business needs. I have learned a lot more than a traditional internship environment through the autonomy I have had in this experience. I have been through the process of having no idea what I am looking at and feeling frustrated over errors. But I have also learned how to approach the client to clarify data questions. I have learned to design, create, and present an automation program from scratch with no guidance but my own. And now I am ready and excited to apply my experience to even more challenging problems.

highlights:
IT Infrastructure Manager at [Builders FirstSource](https://www.linkedin.com/company/builders-firstsource)

IT infrastructure and operations leader with over 20 years of experience designing, modernizing, and supporting complex enterprise environments across manufacturing, distribution, higher education, research computing, and visual effects industries. Proven track record leading infrastructure transformation initiatives, cloud migrations, ERP/WMS integrations, cybersecurity programs, and operational continuity efforts for organizations ranging from research institutions and creative studios to large-scale building materials and distribution companies. Currently focused on infrastructure operations and enterprise systems integration within Builders FirstSource following the acquisition of Truckee Tahoe Lumber Company, where I have led strategic modernization initiatives involving Microsoft Azure, Office 365, virtualization platforms, Active Directory, network infrastructure, Epicor BisTrack ERP, Epicor WMS, security systems, VoIP platforms, and business continuity planning. Experienced in aligning technology operations with business objectives, managing vendor relationships, supporting acquisition integration efforts, and leading cross-functional IT initiatives in high-availability operational environments. Background includes High Performance Computing (HPC) infrastructure support at the University of Nevada, Reno, as well as systems engineering and pipeline infrastructure work within the visual effects industry supporting large-scale production environments. Strong blend of technical depth, operational leadership, strategic planning, and hands-on execution with a focus on building resilient, scalable, and business-aligned technology ecosystems.

results.title: Senior Staff Generative AI Scientist | Wfh
highlights:
Senior Staff Generative AI Scientist | Wfh
...
# Senior Staff Generative AI Scientist
...
The Sr Staff AI Scientist - Generative AI will apply knowledge and experience to real world problems and seek to utilize their skills reduce the cost of healthcare and improve health quality and outcomes. With access to dedicated on premise and cloud based big data solutions, the team can work with a vast amount of structured and unstructured data including claims, membership, physician demographics, medical records and others to begin to solve some of the most pressing healthcare issues of our time. A Data Scientist at Cotiviti will be given the opportunity to work directly with a team of healthcare professionals including analysts, clinicians, coding specialists, auditors and innovators to set aggressive goals and execute on them with the team. This is for an ambitious technologist, with the flexibility and personal drive to succeed in a dynamic environment where they are judged based on their direct impact to business outcomes.
...
- As a Sr Staff AI Scientist - Generative AI within Cotiviti you will be responsible for delivering solutions that help our clients identify payment integrity issues, reduce the cost of healthcare processes, or improve the quality of healthcare outcomes. You will work as part of a team and will be individually responsible for the delivery of value associated with your projects. You will be expected to follow processes and practices that allow your models to be incorporated into our machine learning platform for production execution and monitoring, however, initial exploratory data analysis allows for more flexible experimentation to discover solutions to the business problems presented.
...
- Work with key stakeholders within Research and Development as well as Operations, along with product management to assess the potential value and risks associated with business problems that have the potential to be solved using machine learning and Artificial Intelligence techniques.
...
- Develop an exploratory data analysis approach to verify the initial hypothesis associated with potential Artificial Intelligence/Machine Learning use cases.
...
- Document your approach, thinking and results in standard approaches to allow other data scientists to collaborate with you on this work.
...
- Prepare your final trained model and develop a validation test set for QA.
...
- Work with production operations to deploy your model into production and support them in monitoring model performance.
...
- Participate in other data science teams collaborating with your peers to support their projects.
...
- Participate in knowledge sharing sessions to bring new insights and technologies to the team.
...
- Participate in design sessions to continuously develop and improve the Cotiviti machine learning platform.
...
- Provide End to End value-based solutions, including data pipeline, model creation and application for end user consumption.
...
- PhD or Graduate degree in a quantitative discipline such as Computer Science/Engineering, Statistics, Operations Research covering Advanced Statistics, Machine learning and AI.
- Experience with the latest techniques in natural language processing including transformers, fine-tuning LLMs, measuring/benchmarking and deploying LLMs with tools such as HuggingFace, Langchain, LLAMA/Mistral and OpenAI, vector databases.
...
- 9+ years of hands-on data science/AI experience, using typical machine learning and data science tools including pandas, scikit-learn, keras, nltk, and TensorFlow/PyTorch, GPU.
...
- Experience building production-grade machine learning deployments on AWS, Azure, or GCP.
- Experience working with Apache Spark™ and large-scale distributed datasets.
...
- Experience communicating technical concepts to non-technical and technical audiences is a plus.
...
- Passion for collaboration, learn it all mindset and driving value with AI.

# Artificial Intelligence Solutions Director
...
About this role: Wells Fargo is seeking an Artificial Intelligence Solutions Director, as part of the Artificial Intelligence team. Learn more about career areas and lines of business at wellsfargojobs.com. The Artificial Intelligence Solutions Director leads the enterprise-wide AI vision and strategy by managing a comprehensive AI roadmap aligned to business priorities, shaping governance and responsible AI practices, and driving market‑informed innovation. This role oversees the development and scaling of advanced AI capabilities, including machine learning, NLP, RPA, predictive analytics, and generative AI, while ensuring strict standards for security, fairness, ethics, and risk management. You will build strong cross‑functional partnerships across technology, business, operations, and risk to influence senior leaders, secure alignment, and representing the AI organization in key executive and regulatory forums. You will lead a high‑performing team of AI professionals, foster a culture of innovation and continuous learning, manage people and budget resources, and ensure successful delivery of large‑scale AI initiatives that meet regulatory, operational, and strategic business objectives. In this role, you will: Manage and develop the overall Artificial Intelligence roadmap for the company Provide leadership, management and direction companywide on artificial intelligence initiatives Develop market strategies for the company Lead Artificial Intelligence team by making strategic decisions to resolve robotics process automation, natural language processing, and machine learning Understand the options in the market and educating companywide on these opportunities Collaborate and influence all levels of professionals, including more experienced managers Lead team to achieve objectives Manage allocation of people and financial resources for Artificial Intelligence Solutions Develop and guide a culture of talent development to meet business objectives and strategy
